name: O.R.C. Black Soldier Ant
description: The O.R.C. Black Soldier Ant is the disciplined corrosive version of the black soldier ant. It keeps the pressure of heavy bites, but now mixes them with corrosive spit to force you into its tempo.
behavior: It patrols tunnels and O.R.C. zones with far more discipline than a normal soldier ant. It advances, bites, and re-establishes spacing with very little downtime.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and punishes anyone trying to kite it without first breaking its pattern. If you slip, it mixes bites and corrosion until there is no clean escape left.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually acts as the heavy front line inside O.R.C. groups, keeping you occupied while support units punish from range.
strategy: Spicy is still the best answer. Force the charged bite or corrosive spit to miss before returning damage, because if you let it chain both patterns the fight drags on hard.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: 3-Combo Bite: 69. Charged Bite: 106. Stunning Bite: 75. Corrosive Spit: 100.

abilities.name: 3-Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains several bites to pin you in front of it and open space for the next move.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It steps in firmly and delivers a heavier bite to crack weak defense.

abilities.name: Stunning Bite
abilities.description: A sharper, more violent bite meant to interrupt your immediate answer.

abilities.name: Corrosive Spit
abilities.description: It spits corrosion at mid-range to punish you even while you try to disengage from melee.
